On a mission to make fresh-frozen spirulina accessible to everyone.
Crafted with care, using sustainable farming practices to deliver a superfood that's completely free from additives and preservatives.

Real. Super. Food

Spirulina is a solar-powered nutrient factory.

Converts sunlight into complete protein, iron, B vitamins, and antioxidants. The most nutrient-dense food on earth. And SimpliiGood is the only company that keeps it fresh-frozen — alive, not dead powder.

Not all SPIRULINA is created equally.

Almost all the spirulina sold in America is a dried, stale powder shipped from overseas. Ours is a deep-green, fresh-frozen food, harvested the same day we freeze it.

We are Delicious

Fresh, Frozen, whole.

One farm, traceable to the greenhouse

Almost all the spirulina sold in America is a dried, stale powder shipped from overseas.

Flash-frozen within 4 hours of harvest

We design efficient layouts that maximize usability, flow, and comfort, aligning spatial design with real-life functionality and client needs.

Disccover more
Disccover more

Spirulina contains all essential amino acids, making it one of the only plant sources of complete protein.

Our spirulina is crafted with care, using sustainable farming practices to deliver a pure, potent superfood that's completely free from additives and preservatives.

  • Whole cells with chlorophyll and phycocyanin intact
  • No drying, no heat, no chemical processing
  • Antioxidants preserved by freezing
Explore more
Explore more
Sustainability

Our Climate Footprint

Real Nutrition

We don't process out the good stuff. Flash-freezing preserves every nutrient nature intended.

Clean Innovation

Single ingredients. No fillers. No compromises. Technology that serves nutrition, not the other way around.

Planet Forward

Microalgae cultivation requires 99% less land and water than traditional protein sources.

Nourish Yourself With Nature’s Ultimate Superfood

Testimonials

Real people. Real results.

"Adding SimpliiGood spirulina to my morning smoothie has completely transformed my energy levels. I feel alert all day without any afternoon crash!"

Sarah Jenkins Fitness Coach

"I've tried every spirulina powder out there, but the fresh-frozen cubes are in a league of their own. No fishy taste, just pure nutrition."

Michael Chen Nutritionist

"Adding SimpliiGood spirulina to my morning smoothie has completely transformed my energy levels. I feel alert all day without any afternoon crash!"

Sarah Jenkins Fitness Coach

"I've tried every spirulina powder out there, but the fresh-frozen cubes are in a league of their own. No fishy taste, just pure nutrition."

Michael Chen Nutritionist

"As a vegan, finding high-quality bioavailable protein and iron is key. SimpliiGood makes it so easy. Drop it in my bottle, shake, and done."

Elena Rostova Plant-based Chef

"The customer service is outstanding, and the shipping is fast and packed with dry ice. It arrives frozen solid every single time."

David Carter Daily Consumer

"As a vegan, finding high-quality bioavailable protein and iron is key. SimpliiGood makes it so easy. Drop it in my bottle, shake, and done."

Elena Rostova Plant-based Chef

"The customer service is outstanding, and the shipping is fast and packed with dry ice. It arrives frozen solid every single time."

David Carter Daily Consumer

"My kids actually drink their green smoothies now! The fresh spirulina is virtually tasteless when blended with fruit. Highly recommend."

Amanda Ross Mother of Two

"Clean energy, sustainable sourcing, and zero additives. It checks every single box for me. I will never go back to powdered greens."

James Miller Eco-Entrepreneur

"My kids actually drink their green smoothies now! The fresh spirulina is virtually tasteless when blended with fruit. Highly recommend."

Amanda Ross Mother of Two

"Clean energy, sustainable sourcing, and zero additives. It checks every single box for me. I will never go back to powdered greens."
